message:
🐛 Fix insightRelatedResources test missing MissionProvider mock (#2198)

The insight cards (ClusterDeltaDetector, DeploymentRolloutTracker,
RestartCorrelationMatrix) now render InsightDetailModal which calls
useMissions(). The test was rendering them without a MissionProvider,
causing "useMissions must be used within a MissionProvider" errors.

Add vi.mock for useMissions to provide the required context.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
